description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating parallel stripes of light gray stone and deep black grooves. The block has a solid, monolithic appearance, with the sides and base rendered in a uniform black color, contrasting sharply with the patterned top. The stripes are evenly spaced and run the full length of the block, giving it a visually striking, modern look. The surface texture of the stone appears rough and slightly mottled, typical of granite or similar hard stone. The block is thick and robust, suggesting it is designed to serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. There are no visible engravings, markings, or interactive components on the block.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with a striped gray and black top surface and solid black sides, featuring a rough stone texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horizontal gray and black stripes across the top surface, with a solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical orientation of the stripes and the block's depth, with the black side face visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the horizontal stripes and solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical stripes and the black side face, mirroring view 1.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative or protective barrier
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained with no signs of erosion or moss.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
